name: Gaming information plus visit frequency question
expected_behavior: Poker info is delivered first. Visit frequency question is a natural extension. When the guest reveals monthly visits, the agent adjusts to regular-guest register and skips introductory details
expected_behavioral_quality: Explains gaming floor layout and table game options first, then naturally asks if they've visited before. The gaming overview is useful for both first-timers and regulars. The visit frequency question is framed as 'so I can skip the basics if you already know the floor'.

turns.agent_response:
I'm Seven. The Poker Room is located in the Casino of the Wind and features 33 tables. It is open 24 hours a day and offers games like No-Limit Texas Hold'em and Pot-Limit Omaha.

If you need a quick bite between sessions, Michael Jordan's 23.sportcafe is located nearby in the same casino. Are you looking to join a cash game or one of our daily tournaments?

turns.user_message: Yeah I play here every month
turns.agent_response:
Regular monthly play earns Momentum Points and Tier Credits for every hour of rated poker play. These points are redeemable for dining, hotel stays, and retail, while higher tiers like Ignite or Leap provide increased earn rates and priority access.

If you are looking for a meal between sessions, the Bow & Arrow sports bar is located nearby in the Casino of the Earth. Have you checked your current tier status at a Momentum desk or on the app recently?

Daily tournaments are held with varying buy-ins, though schedules and structures are subject to change. Since you're here on a Wednesday evening, you can also catch a free live show at the Wolf Den starting at 8:00 PM. Are you looking for a specific buy-in level for your tournament tonight?
